title: MultiRecipe
description: No more recipe problems and conflicts when using mods!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_MR_header.webp) No more recipe problems and conflicts when using mods! We know that there are other mods that manage to solve recipe problems in one way or another, but it is also true that most of them do not usually receive prompt updates from day one. Our goal is that as soon as a new version is released, recipe conflicts disappear! And most importantly, it doesn't require any other mod to work! ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_MR_banner2.webp) If there is one good thing about the Minecraft mod community, it is the number of projects that have been launched, which has led to thousands and thousands of new items that can be added. This has its good side and its bad side, since many times, there are duplicate recipes for the same object, and this is exactly what we intend to avoid with this mod. For example, if with 3 blocks of wool horizontally you make a sleeping bag and a hammock, without this mod you could only make one of the two elements, leaving the other completely forgotten. Now you can do both without any problem! ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_MR_banner1.webp) ### Is it compatible with other mods? ### That's what it's all about hehehe, it's perfectly compatible with any other mod, and it will resolve all the recipe conflicts you may have in your game. You will never miss making an item due to incompatibility again! ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
